contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Needs space to spread — clump-forming perennial, divides well after 3 years.

notes: Hardy perennial. Purple coneflower. Immune-support herb. Attracts bees and butterflies. Flowers in second year from seed. Drought-tolerant once established. Roots and flowers both used medicinally.
